trivia: The freighter 777 married the -200LR's legs to a windowless deck and quietly became the backbone of modern air cargo. FedEx, Qatar and Lufthansa Cargo route them through the night.
Night owls catch 777Fs: cargo schedules mean many stations log them mostly after midnight.
funFacts: The best-selling large freighter of its generation.
